label: Storm the Throne Wing
note: Dragon's Lair heart (docs/RAIL-COMMAND.md §Each map's FOUR sub-tracks): the deepest room on the spine — the great-elder dragon's throne wing, where the throne-warden holds the dais and the princess is caged above it. Storming the wing relocates the princess HERE (deepest room); once the great-elder kin is unlocked he relocates to this room and overlays the warden climax. The final, costliest lair node. Rose-OR-gem (roses logarithmic shortcut, gems exponential fallback).
